objective: Resolve the remaining RC1 regression blockers without introducing new runtime features or book-specific heuristics.
summary: Restored conflict-resolution compatibility with the existing test API and preserved the expected diagnostics payload.
Made shadow payload timing deterministic so the V7 shadow output remains stable across runs.

Verified the fix through the targeted blocker tests, broader V7 regression suite, and benchmark harness.
